name: Snowflake
description: Query Snowflake with an admin-defined SQL template and display results directly in the Polarity overlay.

options.name: Account Identifier
options.description: Your Snowflake account locator (e.g., xy12345.us-east-1). Do not include a trailing slash or https://.

options.name: Authentication Type
options.description: Select the authentication method to use when connecting to Snowflake.

options.name: OAuth Token
options.description: Bearer token for OAuth authentication. Required when Authentication Type is set to "OAuth Token". Tokens expire — refresh as needed.

options.name: Username
options.description: Snowflake username for Key-Pair JWT authentication. Required when Authentication Type is "Key-Pair JWT".

options.name: Private Key (PEM)
options.description: PEM-encoded RSA private key for Key-Pair JWT authentication. Include the full key including headers. Required when Authentication Type is "Key-Pair JWT".

options.name: Private Key Passphrase
options.description: Passphrase for the private key if it is encrypted. Leave blank if the private key is not encrypted.

options.name: Warehouse
options.description: (Optional) Snowflake warehouse to use for query execution. Defaults to the user's DEFAULT_WAREHOUSE.

options.name: Database
options.description: (Optional) Target Snowflake database (case-sensitive). Defaults to the user's DEFAULT_NAMESPACE.

options.name: Schema
options.description: (Optional) Target Snowflake schema (case-sensitive). Defaults to the user's DEFAULT_NAMESPACE.

options.name: Role
options.description: (Optional) Role to assume for query execution (case-sensitive). Defaults to the user's DEFAULT_ROLE.

options.name: SQL Query Template
options.description: SQL query to execute for each entity. Use ? as a placeholder for the entity value (all ? placeholders receive the same entity value). Example: SELECT threat_score, category FROM security.events WHERE src_ip = ?

options.name: Entity Binding Type
options.description: The Snowflake binding type for the entity value placeholder (?). Use TEXT for most string-based entity types.

options.name: Query Timeout (seconds)
options.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before the query is cancelled. Set to 0 for no limit (maximum 604800 s). Defaults to 30.

options.name: Result Limit (rows)
options.description: Maximum number of rows to return per query. Enforced server-side via rows_per_resultset. Defaults to 100.

options.name: Summary Attributes
options.description: Comma-delimited list of column names to display as tags in the collapsed summary view. Optionally prefix with a label using "label:column" syntax. If blank, a result count badge is shown.

options.name: Max Summary Items
options.description: Maximum number of summary tags to show per entity. Defaults to 3.

options.name: Detail Attributes
options.description: Comma-delimited list of column names to display in the detail panel. Optionally prefix with a label using "label:column" syntax. If blank, all returned columns are shown.

options.name: Item Title Attribute
options.description: Column name whose value is used as the section title for each result row. If blank, rows are titled "Result 1", "Result 2", etc.
